headline: J. M. Smucker (SJM) Price Target Increased to $125 Following Q3 2026 Results
summary: The J. M. Smucker Company (NYSE:SJM) is included among the 13 Undervalued Dividend Aristocrats to Buy Now. The J. M. Smucker Company (NYSE:SJM) manufactures and markets branded food and beverage products worldwide. On February 27, Barclays analyst Andrew Lazar raised the firm’s price target on The J. M. Smucker Company (NYSE:SJM) from $105 to $125, […]
